delinquency.doctrine: in-place residents only; gross never net; future excluded
delinquency.note: inplace_gross_balance is the surfaced Delinquency spine; prepay shown separately

pending_future.doctrine: leased-not-moved-in + applicants; tracked, NOT counted as current delinquency
